{{Quote|When will those Imperial military buffoons realize that war is nothing without personal honor? You might as well have an army of droids.|Sir Ajax Wennel|<ref name="TEOTS">{{WEGCite|story=The Event of the Season|book=Tapani Sector Instant Adventures}}</ref>}}
'''Sir Ajax Wennel''' was a Knight of [[House Cadriaan]] of the [[Tapani sector/Legends|Tapani sector]]. He was a dynamic noble and a [[Saber rake/Legends|saber rake]] with an anti-[[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] attitude. Although not a supporter of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]], especially with [[Justice Action Network|JAN]] activities within the sector, Ajax saw the behavior of the Empire as a betrayal of honor. He was a guest at the [[Unification Gala]] hosted by [[Lady/Legends|Lady]] [[Peta Lactril]] prior to the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]].
